name: Chinese Cole Slaw Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 packages of Top Ramen, Oriental or chicken flavor, crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the salad dressing by combining 1 teaspoon salt, 3/4 teaspoon pepper, 3 tablespoons sugar, 1/4 cup salad oil, 1/4 cup vinegar, 1/4 cup sesame oil, and 1/2 teaspoon chili oil in a bowl. Stir in 1 tablespoon hoisin sauce.
2. Chill the dressing until ready to use.
3. Mix shredded cabbage and carrots with crumbled ramen noodles, sliced almonds, chopped cilantro, and toasted sesame seeds in a large bowl.
4. Just before serving, pour the prepared dressing over the salad ingredients and toss gently to coat evenly.
